abilities.description: If CARDNAME is on the battlefield, flip CARDNAME onto the battlefield from a height of at least one foot. If CARDNAME turns over completely at least once during the flip, destroy all nontoken permanents it touches. Then destroy CARDNAME.

effect.description: If CARDNAME is on the battlefield, flip CARDNAME onto the battlefield from a height of at least one foot. If CARDNAME turns over completely at least once during the flip, destroy all nontoken permanents it touches. Then destroy CARDNAME.
effect.name: FlipOntoBattlefield
